MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library
  • Examples
  • Release Notes
Java Examples

Java examples are provided by Magewell SDKv3 which can be ported and optimized by developers. The Java examples are in SDKv3\Examples\Java\. For now, SDKv3 only provides a collection of GUI examples.

  1. AVCaptureJava is in the SDKv3\Examples\Java\AVCaptureJava\
  2. AVCapture2Java is in the SDKv3\Examples\Java\AVCapture2Java\

Overview

Java examples use JNI to call functions provided by SDKv3. The dynamic library created by JNI technology needs to comply with the JNI technical specifications in order to call the functions in the dll file. The dynamic library of the JNI specification is located in the dir: SDKv3\Examples\Java\jni\

#include <jni.h>
#include "jawt_md.h"
/* Header for class com_magewell_libmwcapture_LibMWCapture */
#ifndef _Included_com_magewell_libmwcapture_LibMWCapture
#define _Included_com_magewell_libmwcapture_LibMWCapture
#ifdef __cplusplus
extern "C" {
#endif
char* WCHARToChar(WCHAR *wchar);
WCHAR* CharToWCHAR(char *str);
char* jstringToChar(JNIEnv *env,jstring jstr);
jstring CharTojstring(JNIEnv* env, char* str);
/*
* Class: com_magewell_libmwcapture_LibMWCapture
* Method: InitNative
* Signature: ()Z
*/
JNIEXPORT jboolean JNICALL Java_com_magewell_libmwcapture_LibMWCapture_InitNative
(JNIEnv *, jclass);
...
#ifdef __cplusplus
}
#endif
#endif

System.loadLibrary is available within Java to load a dynamic library that complies with the JNI specification, and functions are declared in java syntax within the dll.

public class LibMWCapture {
static {
try {
System.loadLibrary("LibMWCaptureJni");
}
catch(Exception e) {
String path = System.getProperty("java.class.path");
int firstIndex = path.lastIndexOf(System.getProperty("path.separator")) + 1;
int lastIndex = path.lastIndexOf(File.separator) + 1;
path = path.substring(firstIndex, lastIndex);
String jnipath=path+"LibMWCaptureJni.dll";
String mwcapturepath=path+"LibMWCapture.dll";
String mediapath=path+"LibMWMedia.dll";
String jwatpath=path+"jawt.dll";
System.load(mwcapturepath);
System.load(mediapath);
System.load(jwatpath);
System.load(jnipath);
}
}
public static native boolean InitNative();
public static native void ExitNative();
public static native long GetJavaWnd(JApplet applet);
public static native boolean MWCaptureInitInstance();
public static native void MWCaptureExitInstance();
...
}

The current Java examples include some functions of the LibMWCapture library and some audio and video rendering functions.

Some functions of the LibMWCapture library are defined in the dir: SDKv3\Examples\JavaLibMWCapture\src\com\magewell\libmwcapture\LibMWCapture.java

1. AVCaptureJava

AVCaptureJava is used to render audio and video based on Pro Capture Family Functions and Eco Capture Family Functions. It has the same function and program logic as AVCapture C++.

AVCaptureJava

2. AVCapture2Java

AVCapture2Java is used to render audio and video based on Universal Functions. It has the same function and program logic as AVCapture2 C++.

AVCapture2Java
